name: Spam Strudels with Mustard Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat (12 oz), chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine the chopped SPAM, Swiss cheese, sliced mushrooms, beaten egg, and green onions in a bowl.
3. Brush one phyllo sheet with butter. Keep remaining phyllo sheets covered with a damp towel to prevent drying.
4. Fold the brushed phyllo sheet in half crosswise, then brush with more butter. Fold again in half, brushing once more.
5. Place about 1/3 cup of the SPAM mixture in the center of the folded phyllo.
6. Fold the long sides up and over the filling, slightly overlapping.
7. Fold into thirds from the narrow edge, ensuring the seam side is down on a baking sheet. Cover with a damp towel to prevent drying.
8. Repeat steps 3-7 with the remaining phyllo sheets.
9. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
10. Serve with Mustard Sauce.
MUSTARD SAUCE:
1. In a saucepan, combine sour cream, mayonnaise or salad dressing, dry mustard, and sugar.
2. Heat over low heat, stirring occasionally, until warm.
